holdings.infoBox: VPU is an equity ETF with a total of 75 individual holdings. The top holdings are NextEra Energy stock at 11.73%, The Southern Company at 6.71%, Duke Energy at 6.17%, Constellation Energy at 5.73%, and American Electric Power Company at 4.45%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Utilities ETF (VPU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI US IMI 25/50 Utilities index. The fund is passively managed to invest in the US utilities sector. VPU was launched on Jan 26, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.
